title: [BUG] addConditionalFormatting does nothing when the attribute ref is a multiple range
author: rodrigosalinas2

comments.author: zurmokeeper
rodrigosalinas2
comments.body: Thank you @zurmokeeper for your time. The problem with this solution is that the colors will be calculated again according to the values of each row, not the values of the whole range. I already solved it another way. Thanks again.

comments.author: rodrigosalinas2
comments.body: If really is not possible to pass multiple ranges, I think the documentation should state so.
